member.name: T:Cloud_Kitchen.My.MyWebExtension
member.summary: Module used to define the properties that are available in the My Namespace for Web projects.

member.name: P:Cloud_Kitchen.My.MyWebExtension.Application
member.summary: Returns information about the current application.

member.name: P:Cloud_Kitchen.My.MyWebExtension.Computer
member.summary: Returns information about the host computer.

member.name: P:Cloud_Kitchen.My.MyWebExtension.User
member.summary: Returns information for the current Web user.

member.name: P:Cloud_Kitchen.My.MyWebExtension.WebServices
member.summary: Provides access to WebServices added to this project.
